components.name: log4j-api
components.description:
The logging API of the Log4j project.
    Library and application code can log through this API.
    It contains a simple built-in implementation (`SimpleLogger`) for trivial use cases.
    Production applications are recommended to use Log4j API in combination with a fully-fledged implementation, such as Log4j Core.

components.name: commons-compress
components.description:
Apache Commons Compress defines an API for working with
compression and archive formats. These include bzip2, gzip, pack200,
LZMA, XZ, Snappy, traditional Unix Compress, DEFLATE, DEFLATE64, LZ4,
Brotli, Zstandard and ar, cpio, jar, tar, zip, dump, 7z, arj.

components.name: commons-codec
components.description:
The Apache Commons Codec component contains encoders and decoders for
     formats such as Base16, Base32, Base64, digest, and Hexadecimal. In addition to these
     widely used encoders and decoders, the codec package also maintains a
     collection of phonetic encoding utilities.

components.name: commons-io
components.description:
The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters,
file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.

components.name: commons-lang3
components.description:
Apache Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the
  classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so
  standard as to justify existence in java.lang.

  The code is tested using the latest revision of the JDK for supported
  LTS releases: 8, 11, 17 and 21 currently.
  See https://github.com/apache/commons-lang/blob/master/.github/workflows/maven.yml
  
  Please ensure your build environment is up-to-date and kindly report any build issues.

components.name: commons-csv
components.description: The Apache Commons CSV library provides a simple interface for reading and writing CSV files of various types.

components.name: disruptor
components.description: Conversant Disruptor - very high throughput Java BlockingQueue

components.description: The slf4j API

components.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON

components.name: jackson-databind
components.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

components.name: jackson-annotations
components.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

components.name: jackson-dataformat-xml
components.description:
Data format extension for Jackson to offer
alternative support for serializing POJOs as XML and deserializing XML as POJOs.

components.name: woodstox-core
components.description:
Woodstox is a high-performance XML processor that implements Stax (JSR-173),
SAX2 and Stax2 APIs

components.name: jackson-dataformat-yaml
components.description: Support for reading and writing YAML-encoded data via Jackson abstractions.

components.name: snakeyaml
components.description: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java

components.description: Java Concurrency Tools Core Library

components.name: jnacl
components.description: Pure Java implementation of NaCl: Networking and Cryptography library.

components.name: zstd-jni
components.description: JNI bindings for Zstd native library that provides fast and high compression lossless algorithm for Java and all JVM languages.

components.name: lz4-java
components.description: Java ports and bindings of the LZ4 compression algorithm and the xxHash hashing algorithm

components.name: snappy-java
components.description: snappy-java: A fast compression/decompression library

components.name: javax.mail
components.description: JavaMail API

components.name: activation
components.description: JavaBeans Activation Framework (JAF) is a standard extension to the Java platform that lets you take advantage of standard services to: determine the type of an arbitrary piece of data; encapsulate access to it; discover the operations available on it; and instantiate the appropriate bean to perform the operation(s).

components.name: stax2-api
components.description: Stax2 API is an extension to basic Stax 1.0 API that adds significant new functionality, such as full-featured bi-direction validation interface and high-performance Typed Access API.
